name: hormozi-money
description: Operationalize Alex Hormozi's $100M Money Models framework — select the right revenue model, architect pricing for maximum value extraction, optimize LTV, and apply the More/Better/New decision framework to every revenue decision. Works across products, subscriptions, services, and asset businesses at any stage.

commands.name: model-picker
commands.description: Select the optimal revenue model (product / subscription / service / asset) for a business and design the monetization stack

commands.name: price-architect
commands.description: Design a complete pricing architecture — anchor, core, upsell, and continuity — to maximize revenue per customer

commands.name: ltv-optimizer
commands.description: Diagnose and improve customer lifetime value across all LTV levers: retention, upsell, pricing, and frequency

commands.name: more-better-new
commands.description: Apply the More/Better/New revenue decision framework to determine the highest-ROI growth move at the current stage

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — 4 Money Models, Pricing Architecture, LTV Maximizer, More/Better/New framework
